entities.name: SUDAN
entities.description: A country where chickpea is cultivated in specific northern regions.

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop cultivated in Sudan, specifically in the northern region.

entities.name: WAD HAMED
entities.description: An area in the northern region of Sudan along the river Nile where chickpea is an important crop.

entities.name: RUBALAB
entities.description: An area in the northern region of Sudan along the river Nile where chickpea is an important crop.

entities.name: RIVER NILE
entities.description: The river along which chickpea is grown in northern Sudan.

entities.name: KABULI
entities.description: A local small-seeded variety of chickpea.

entities.name: 100-SEED MASS
entities.description: A measurement of the mass of 100 seeds used to characterize chickpea varieties.

entities.name: SHENDI
entities.description: A larger-seeded variety of chickpea, also known as NEC 2491.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of crop produced per unit area, reported as 1045 kg ha-1 for chickpea in Sudan.

entities.name: SOWING TIME
entities.description: The period during which the crop is planted, with mid-November being optimal.

relationships.description: has a mean value of 1045 kg ha-1
has an optimal period in mid-November
